osint-methodology.description: Three-tier OSINT methodology (White/Grey/Black) + Grey escalation protocol with Human-in-the-Loop

osint-regions.description: Regional specialization: СНГ (Russia, Belarus, Ukraine, Kazakhstan) and Europe (EU/EEA/UK) — registries, social networks, search operators, legal frameworks

osint-tools-infra.description: Network reconnaissance tools: Shodan, crt.sh, SecurityTrails, DNSDumpster, BGPView, theHarvester, Maltego, SpiderFoot, FOFA, Censys, ZoomEye. Use for domains, IPs, and infrastructure.

osint-tools-identity.description: Identity & breach tools: Sherlock, Snoop Project, HIBP, Holehe, LeakCheck, IntelX, DeHashed. Use for usernames, emails, phones, and persons.

osint-tools-grey.description: Grey OSINT tools: Darknet monitoring, Telegram OSINT bots (СНГ). Safety gate — load ONLY after user confirms Grey escalation.

osint-tools-analysis.description: File/metadata analysis and search dorks: ExifTool, VirusTotal, urlscan.io, Google/Yandex/Bing/GitHub dorks. Use for document analysis, URL scanning, and advanced search queries.

osint-tools-scripts.description: Ready-to-use Python templates for OSINT automation: username search, email leak check, DNS/WHOIS recon, EGR Belarus parser, correlation graph builder. Lazy-load — only when a script is actually needed.

osint-reporting.description: Professional OSINT reports in markdown with Mermaid diagrams (entity graph, infrastructure map, timeline, process flow, reliability heatmap). Enforces coverage gate: asks user whether enough data is collected before generating the final report.

osint-tools-web.description: Web intelligence tools — whatweb (technology fingerprinting), gau + waybackurls (URL discovery from archives), eyewitness (automated screenshots). Use for domain and website reconnaissance.

osint-tools-sn0int.description: Semi-automatic OSINT framework with 150+ modules covering email, username, phone, domain, IP, cryptocurrency. Modular alternative to running individual tools for complex investigations.

osint-tools-registries.description: State registries and public databases of CIS countries — EGR, EGRUL, KAD, FSSP, Fedresurs, bankrot.gov.by, EDR, OpenCorporates. Use for legal entity due diligence in СНГ.

osint-tools-cis.description: CIS-specific tools — VKontakte (220vk, vkpt, TopDB), Face Recognition (search4faces, FindClone), YaSeeker (Yandex account OSINT), tel.belinf.net (phone search BY/RU/UA). Use for persons/phones/photos in СНГ region.

osint-toolkit.description: [DEPRECATED] Legacy meta-skill. Use osint-tools-infra, osint-tools-identity, osint-tools-grey, osint-tools-analysis, osint-tools-scripts, osint-tools-web, osint-tools-sn0int instead.
